chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos. 1818 to 1821 of 2023 __________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No. 25, 26 & 28. 2. For order on CMA No. 4998/2023. (Exemption) 3. For order on main case. 4. For order on CMA No. 4999/2023 (Stay) 09.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Salman, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Nadeem Qureshi, advocate for applicant. These references are pending since 2023 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date despite more than two years have been lapsed from institution hereof. Today, brief is being held and time is being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with these matters, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these references are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected files. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
